texto: I like the spirit of this great London which I feel around me. Who but a coward would pass his whole life in hamlets
autor: and for ever abandon his faculties to the eating rust of obscurity?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a and for ever abandon his faculties to the eating rust of obscurity?: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I like the spirit of this great London which I feel around me. Who but a coward would pass his wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, charlotte-bronte, villette pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de villette.
